revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-240

Alternative term: Pressed Glass (or plastic)

Glass (or plastic) formed into the shape required for optical purposes by allowing it to solidify from the molten state in a suitably shaped mould.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Moulded Glass (or plastic)}}
